name: fetchPage
description: Client-side pagination. Fetches the next page from a paginated API endpoint using a cursor and writes the response to the specified data model path, replacing existing data.

url.description: The API endpoint URL to fetch the next page from.

path.description: A JSON pointer path into the data model to resolve the cursor value dynamically.

cursor.description: Optional pagination cursor. Can be a literal string or a DynamicString referencing a data model path. If omitted, the request is made without a cursor parameter (first page).

targetPath.description: The JSON pointer path in the data model where the fetched page data will be written.

method.description: The HTTP method to use for the request.
